notes: PKG.MEDIA_COOLDOWN_BLOCKED is enforcement point 2 of the three §8.6 points (DD-14), deterministic in engine/gate/validate-package.js against the canonical usage-log ledger. cooldownStatus uses Date.now(), so each case's 'usage_history' is expressed as RELATIVE offsets (used_days_ago) the runner converts to used_at and seeds into a temp CONTENT_HOME — keeping the verdict byte-stable across CI runs. The default hard floor is 14 days (config: cooldown.hard_days; per-brand cooldown_overrides).

cases.name: in-cooldown
cases.notes: The bound image was used 3 days ago — inside the 14-day hard floor.

cases.name: past-cooldown
cases.notes: The same asset used 20 days ago is past the 14-day floor — cooldown clears.
